results.title: Jacquelynne Hardester Marble
results.description: Jacquelynne Hardester Marble passed peacefully on Sunday, May 3, with her daughter and her fabulous caregivers by her side. She loved her family, the outdoors, travel, cooking, gardening, good food and wine, good books, great conversations, cats, and the company of friends. Jackie was born to Reed and Marion Hardester of Middletown, California, on April 27, 1936. After graduating from Middletown...

results.title: Suriya’s Karuppu Becomes His Biggest Box Office Success In Years
results.description: Karuppu collected Rs. 94 crore in 4 days at the Indian box office. The Suriya starrer is set to become the actor’s first Rs. 100 crore grosser.

results.title: Singaporeans say PayNow’s new name masking method is ‘still too weak’
results.description: SINGAPORE: Singapore’s deliberate modifications to PayNow show names have sparked concern on-line, with some customers arguing that the brand new masking system might expose extra private data than the nickname characteristic it’s changing. The Affiliation of Banks in Singapore (ABS) introduced on Apr 29 that PayNow nicknames for retail customers might be discontinued from Jun [...] The post Singaporeans say PayNow’s new name masking method is ‘still too weak’ appeared first on Asia Today .

results.description: The possibility that fans in India may miss out is the latest in a series of setbacks for world soccer's showpiece event.
